case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. RUBY TAPIA RUIZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $642.13 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, RUBY TAPIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-21-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RUBY TAPIA RUIZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL GARCIA, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-09-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUIZ, RUBY TAPIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ, RUBY TAPIA $642.13 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $722.13 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
